title: VRF over GRE + IPsec: CORP VRF'i Tunnel0 ile Uzat ve Profille Koru (R10/R20)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: The operations team started configuring network devices for a new site. R10 and R20 are preconfigured with the CORP VRF. R10 has network connectivity to R20. Complete the configurations to achieve these goals:
Task 1: Extend the CORP VRF between R10 and R20 using Tunnel0.
Task 2: Protect Tunnel0 using the preconfigured profile.
hints: 'tunnel vrf CORP' tünelin taşıma (underlay) tarafını CORP VRF'ine yerleştirir — CORP VRF'i tünel üzerinden uzatır.
R10'da 'show run | sec profile' ile IPsec profil adının MyProfile olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek adı kullan.
Koruma tünel arayüzü altında 'tunnel protection ipsec profile <ad>' ile yapılır.
answer_key_raw:
R10:
R10> enable
R10# configure terminal
R10(config)# no router ospf 100
R10(config)# router ospf 100 vrf CORP
R10(config-router)# router-id 10.10.10.10
R10(config-router)# exit
R10(config)# crypto keyring test vrf CORP
R10(conf-keyring)# pre-shared-key address 10.10.2.1 0.0.0.0 key cisco
R10(conf-keyring)# exit
R10(config)# interface Ethernet0/1
R10(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding CORP
R10(config-if)# ip address 10.10.1.1 255.255.255.0
R10(config-if)# ip ospf network point-to-point
R10(config-if)# ip ospf 100 area 0
R10(config-if)# interface Tunnel0
R10(config-if)# tunnel vrf CORP
R10(config-if)# tunnel protection ipsec profile MyProfile
R10(config-if)# end
R10# write

R20:
R20> enable
R20# configure terminal
R20(config)# no router ospf 100
R20(config)# router ospf 100 vrf CORP
R20(config-router)# router-id 20.20.20.20
R20(config-router)# exit
R20(config)# crypto keyring test vrf CORP
R20(conf-keyring)# pre-shared-key address 10.10.1.1 0.0.0.0 key cisco
R20(conf-keyring)# exit
R20(config)# interface Ethernet0/2
R20(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding CORP
R20(config-if)# ip address 10.10.2.1 255.255.255.0
R20(config-if)# ip ospf network point-to-point
R20(config-if)# ip ospf 100 area 0
R20(config-if)# interface Tunnel0
R20(config-if)# tunnel vrf CORP
R20(config-if)# tunnel protection ipsec profile MyProfile
R20(config-if)# end
R20# write
explanation: CORP VRF'i tünel üzerinden uzatmak için tünel arayüzünün taşıma tarafı 'tunnel vrf CORP' ile CORP VRF'ine alınır; komşuluk için transport interface de aynı VRF'e konur ve OSPF 'vrf CORP' örneğiyle çalıştırılır. Tünel, önceden tanımlı IPsec profili ile 'tunnel protection ipsec profile MyProfile' komutuyla korunur — bu, GRE tünelini IPsec ile şifreler.
